news.title: MullaeCompany moves into the Yeongdeungpo Startup Support Center office
news.body: MullaeCompany moved into an office at the Yeongdeungpo Startup Support Center on April 1, 2026, establishing a new base for its operations.

news.title: Oneul_Pharmacy Instagram surpasses 15,000 followers
news.body: Our pharmacist-run Instagram @oneul_pharmacy just crossed the 15K-follower mark — thank you for growing with us.

news.title: MullaeCompany secures high-grade European ingredients
news.body: We've signed long-term sourcing agreements for premium European raw materials, laying the groundwork for a truly differentiated product line.
